data.title: Ether.fi Foundation Updates on ETHFI Token Buyback and Distribution
data.description: According to PANews, the Ether.fi Foundation has announced updates regarding the buyback of ETHFI tokens on the X platform. This week, the foundation utilized 73 ETH, equivalent to approximately $314,000, from protocol revenue to purchase 264,000 ETHFI tokens. Additionally, around 155,000 ETHFI tokens have been destroyed, and approximately 108,000 ETHFI tokens have been distributed to sETHFI holders.

data.title: SharpLink Gaming to Stake Ethereum Treasury on Linea Mainnet
data.description: According to Foresight News, SharpLink Gaming intends to stake a portion of its Ethereum treasury following the launch of the Linea mainnet. The company aims to leverage the new network's capabilities to enhance its blockchain operations. This strategic move is part of SharpLink Gaming's broader efforts to optimize its digital assets and explore innovative blockchain solutions.

data.title: Edgen Collaborates with Sahara AI to Enhance Market Insights
data.description: According to Foresight News, AI operating system Edgen has partnered with decentralized AI network Sahara AI. This collaboration aims to improve the accuracy and reliability of AI insights in stock and cryptocurrency markets through Sahara AI's data validation capabilities. The partnership will focus on targeted pilot projects to achieve these enhancements.

data.title: Dogecoin on the Edge: ETF Odds Hit 94% as Analysts Call for $10 DOGE
data.description:
"Dogecoin is currently experiencing a significant surge in interest and investment, particularly with the likelihood of an exchange-traded fund (ETF) being approved, as the odds have reached an impressive 94%. This growing optimism has led analysts to boldly predict that the value of DOGE could potentially rise to as high as $10, a substantial increase that reflects the cryptocurrency's recent momentum and the increasing acceptance of digital assets in mainstream finance."
source: https://blocknews.com/dogecoin-on-the-edge-etf-odds-hit-94-as-analysts-call-for-10-doge/

data.title: U.S. senate advances crypto market bill with tokenized assets amendment
data.description:
6-9-2025 – The U. S. Senate revised its comprehensive crypto market structure legislation on Friday, adding language to ensure tokenized stocks and securities maintain their regulatory classification when moved to blockchain platforms. The amendment addresses concerns that digitized traditional assets could fall into regulatory gray areas between securities and commodities oversight
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/u-s-senate-advances-crypto-market-bill-with-tokenized-assets-amendment/

data.title: LBANK EDGE will be launched on LARTS at 19:00 today
data.description: According to official news, LBANK EDGE will officially launch LARTS, a meme token from the LBmeme Launch platform, at 7:00 PM today, and will simultaneously launch a trading compensation program with a maximum payout of 100 Units (U). LARTS, a meme token launched fairly by the LBmeme platform under LBank, is currently trading at 0.011 Units, a 4,300% increase in value. LBANK EDGE previously listed the LBmeme asset LDOG, which saw a peak increase of 5,454%. As LBank's high-potential asset zone, LBANK EDGE integrates cutting-edge value discovery mechanisms with institutional-grade liquidity, aiming to discover high-quality emerging assets and safeguarding user transactions through a multi-layered protection system.

data.title: CryptoQuant CEO: Sun Yuchen selling unlocked tokens is understandable, the responsibility lies with the WLFI Foundation
data.description: CryptoQuant CEO Ki Young Ju posted on social media that he supports Sun Yuchen's sale of unlocked tokens and believes there is nothing wrong with it. He said the WLFI Foundation should be held accountable because it implemented a "de-banking" process for users, which violated its own founding purpose.

data.title: Crypto billionaire to splash $20 million on these cryptocurrencies
data.description:
Crypto billionaire Justin Sun has announced plans to invest $20 million in digital assets, splitting the funds between altcoins and World Liberty Financial (WLFI). According to the Tron founder, he intends to allocate $10 million toward unspecified altcoins, with the remaining amount directed to the newly launched WLFI. We believe U.S

data.title: Gold's Trustworthiness Compared to Bitcoin Discussed by Trader
data.description: According to Foresight News, cryptocurrency trader James Wynn recently tweeted that gold is currently more trustworthy than Bitcoin. However, he suggested that this situation might reverse in the future.

data.title: ALT5 Sigma's holdings of WLFI tokens increased to 7.28 billion, worth approximately $1.31 billion
data.description: ALT 5 Sigma Corporation, the Nasdaq-listed WLFI treasury, updated its holdings, revealing that as of September 5th, the company's holdings of WLFI tokens had increased to 7,283,585,650, valued at approximately $1.31 billion at a market price of $0.18. ALT 5 Sigma also disclosed that it currently holds 124,946,728 shares of common stock and prepaid warrants to subscribe for up to 99 million shares of the outstanding common stock. (Businesswire)

data.title: Tether CEO Confirms Stablecoin Giant Will Deploy $200,000,000 in Gold Mining and Royalties in Pursuit of ‘Stability Maximalism’
data.description:
The chief executive of stablecoin issuer Tether says that the firm is investing in gold mining as a means of obtaining maximum stability for its asset-pegged digital asset products. In a new post on X, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino confirms that the company is venturing outside the world of digital assets, calling it “stability maximalism.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/09/06/tether-ceo-confirms-the-stablecoin-giant-will-deploy-200000000-in-gold-mining-and-royalties-in-pursuit-of-stability-maximum/

data.title: Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) Launches MEMELESS
data.description: Bitget's Onchain trading platform has launched MEMELESS, the Solana ecosystem's MEME token. Users can start trading on the Onchain trading section. Bitget Onchain aims to seamlessly connect CEXs and DEXs, providing users with a more convenient, efficient, and secure on-chain trading experience. Users can directly trade popular on-chain assets (USDT/USDC) using their Bitget spot accounts. Currently, popular public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC), and Base are supported.

data.title: The founder of RMRK claimed that his address was mistakenly identified as high-risk by WLFI and locked
data.description: RMRK founder Bruno Skvorc stated in a post that his address was mistakenly flagged as high-risk by the WLFI team, resulting in the locking of his tokens. On-chain analyst ZachXBT commented that WLFI's proactive address review may protect victims to some extent, but false positives and the blacklisting of legitimate users could severely damage the project's reputation. He also expressed hope that the false positive issue could be resolved quickly.
